response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio vocalizations phonetically match the provided reference lyrics for both 'Chase! Chase! Chase!' and 'Ginjin Renka'. 2. JSON Usage: Lyrics JSON was used to ensure accurate transcription; the outro dialogue was manually transcribed as it was not in the reference. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to vocal cord activation; aggressive truncation and zero-gap transitions were applied during rapid song sections to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: いつか君まで 追い越すから
subtitles.english: I'll eventually overtake even you

subtitles.original: いつでも どこでも 狙い撃ち
subtitles.english: Anytime, anywhere, I'll take my shot

subtitles.original: ふたりの距離は 縮まるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if the distance between us will shrink

subtitles.original: ノドの乾きも 忘れたまま
subtitles.english: While still forgetting the thirst in my throat

subtitles.original: 笑わないよ Chase!
subtitles.english: I won't smile, Chase!

subtitles.original: 君の代わりは ひとりもいない
subtitles.english: There's not a single person who can replace you

subtitles.original: 君の代わりじゃ ボクはいらない
subtitles.english: If it's a replacement for you, I don't want it

subtitles.original: 不覚にも 涙がこぼれても
subtitles.english: Even if tears should accidentally fall

subtitles.original: もうここは ひとつ 笑うしかない
subtitles.english: There's nothing left to do but laugh now

subtitles.original: 今も 昔も これからずっと
subtitles.english: Now, in the past, and forever from now on

subtitles.original: 代わりのボクは どこにもいない
subtitles.english: There's no replacement for me anywhere

subtitles.original: あぁ そうだったのかって
subtitles.english: Ah, I see it was like that

subtitles.original: きっと きっと
subtitles.english: Surely, surely

subtitles.original: 分かり合える その日が来るから
subtitles.english: Because the day we understand each other will come

subtitles.original: Chase! 今日もひとつ 笑うしかない
subtitles.english: Chase! Today, there's nothing left but to laugh

subtitles.original: 闇に放り込んだ
subtitles.english: Thrust into the darkness

subtitles.original: 想い 届いていますか？
subtitles.english: Are my feelings reaching you?

subtitles.original: 吟人恋歌
subtitles.english: [Title: Ginjin Renka - Singer's Love Song]

subtitles.original: 浅い夢の醒め際に 毎日
subtitles.english: Every day, as I wake from shallow dreams

subtitles.original: 伝う 涙の理由は どこから
subtitles.english: Where does the reason for these streaming tears come from?

subtitles.original: きっと戻ってくるよと 頬を撫でる手は 冷たくて
subtitles.english: The hand stroking my cheek, saying you'll surely return, was so cold

subtitles.original: ぎゅっと広い背中を 抱きしめた
subtitles.english: I tightly hugged your broad back

subtitles.original: 謡え 謡え 通い路恋歌 たとえ声は しなくとも
subtitles.english: Sing, sing, the Path Love Song, even if no voice is heard

subtitles.original: 届け 届け 通い路恋歌
subtitles.english: Reach, reach, the Path Love Song

subtitles.original: 愛する人の為 ずっと笑顔で居るから
subtitles.english: For the one I love, I'll always be smiling

subtitles.original: 淡い日々の思い出に 毎日
subtitles.english: Every day, in the memories of faint days

subtitles.original: すがるふたりの姿は 儚げ
subtitles.english: The figures of the two of us clinging on seem so fleeting

subtitles.original: ぐっと抑え続けた 瞳の奥のやさしさが
subtitles.english: The kindness deep in my eyes that I kept holding back

subtitles.original: ふと通り咲く 刹那に溢れる
subtitles.english: Suddenly blooms as it passes, overflowing in an instant

subtitles.original: 止まれ 止まれ 防人恋歌 たとえ声は しなくとも
subtitles.english: Stop, stop, the Guardian's Love Song, even if no voice is heard

subtitles.original: 届け 届け 通い路恋歌
subtitles.english: Reach, reach, the Path Love Song

subtitles.original: 愛する人の為 ずっと笑顔で居るから
subtitles.english: For the one I love, I'll always be smiling

subtitles.original: 貴方の為 君の為 また出会う日までの約束
subtitles.english: For you, for my dear, a promise until the day we meet again

subtitles.original: どんな思いが 馳せようと 笑顔で居よう
subtitles.english: No matter what thoughts race through, let's stay smiling

subtitles.original: 遠く 遠く 分かれても
subtitles.english: Even if we're separated far, far away

subtitles.original: 辛い時は 歌に乗せて
subtitles.english: When it's hard, put it into a song

subtitles.original: ずっと待っているよと しがみつく手は 震えてて
subtitles.english: Saying I'll always wait for you, my clinging hands were trembling

subtitles.original: もっと強く深く深く 抱きしめた
subtitles.english: I hugged you even tighter and deeper

subtitles.original: 謡え 謡え 通い路恋歌 たとえ声が 枯れても
subtitles.english: Sing, sing, the Path Love Song, even if my voice withers

subtitles.original: 笑え 笑え 通い路恋歌 暖かい陽は まだ遠く
subtitles.english: Laugh, laugh, the Path Love Song, the warm sun is still far away

subtitles.original: ずっと ずっと 謡えるのは 君の声が するから
subtitles.english: The reason I can sing forever and ever is because I hear your voice

subtitles.original: 届け 届け 防人恋歌
subtitles.english: Reach, reach, the Guardian's Love Song

subtitles.original: 愛する人の為 ずっと笑顔で居るから
subtitles.english: For the one I love, I'll always be smiling

subtitles.original: はい、みなさん見てますか？
subtitles.english: Yes, everyone, are you watching?

subtitles.original: はい、ということでですね、
subtitles.english: Yes, so regarding that,

subtitles.original: あきちゃんとはピンクローズを、
subtitles.english: with Aki-chan we did Pink Rose,

subtitles.original: リリィカとはチェイスチェイスチェイスを...
subtitles.english: and with Lilyka we did Chase! Chase! Chase!...
